message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 5 more conformance fixtures (CNL/CPL, EL, C0)

Cover CNL/CPL cursor movement (CSI E/F), erase-line-left (CSI 1 K),
erase-full-line (CSI 2 K), tab stop (HT), and CR+LF combo. Total
corpus now 26 fixtures across 7 categories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "cr_lf_combo",
+  "description": "CR (0x0D) returns to col 0, LF (0x0A) moves down one row",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243440d0a5859",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD at (0,0)-(0,3), CR to (0,0), LF to (1,0), print XY at (1,0)-(1,1). Cursor at (1,2).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "Y" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "cnl_cpl_basic",
+  "description": "CSI E (CNL) moves to next line start, CSI F (CPL) moves to prev line start",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41421b5b3245591b5b31461b5b364358",
+  "comment": "Print AB at (0,0)-(0,1), CNL(2) to (2,0), print Y at (2,0), CPL(1) to (1,0), CUF(6) to (1,6), print X at (1,6).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 7 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 6, "char": "X" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "el_full",
+  "description": "CSI 2 K erases entire line",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243441b5b32481b5b324b1b5b314858",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD at (0,0)-(0,3), CUP(2) to (1,0), EL(2) erases entire row 1 (already blank, no visible effect), CUP(1) to (0,0), print X at (0,0). Row 0 now has X B C D.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
